sn27.10:1.2: “Monks, any desire-passion with regard to form is a defilement of the mind. Any desire-passion with regard to feeling… perception… fabrications… consciousness is a defilement of the mind.
sn27.10:1.3: When, with regard to these five bases, the defilements of awareness are abandoned, then the mind is inclined to renunciation.
sn27.10:1.4: The mind fostered by renunciation feels malleable for the direct knowing of those qualities worth realizing.”
